6	import AlgebraicJacobian.Genus0BaseObjects.BareScheme
7	import AlgebraicJacobian.Genus0BaseObjects.ChartIso
8	
9	/-!
10	# Genus-`0` base objects (Stratum 3): standard `k̄`-points on `ℙ¹`; `𝔾_a` and `𝔾_m`
11	
12	This file is **Stratum 3** of the four-stratum split of the legacy
13	`AlgebraicJacobian.Genus0BaseObjects` (iter-175 refactor `g0bo-split`). It ships:
14	
15	* the three standard `k̄`-points `0 = [0 : 1]`, `1 = [1 : 1]`, `∞ = [1 : 0]` of
16	  `ProjectiveLineBar kbar`, encoded as sections of `ProjectiveLineBar.hom`;
17	* the additive group `Ga` over `Spec k̄` (= `AffineSpace (Fin 1)`) and its
18	  affine, finite-presentation, and reduced instances;
19	* the multiplicative group `Gm` over `Spec k̄` (= `Spec k̄[t, t⁻¹]`) and its
20	  affine, finite-presentation, reduced, domain, and irreducible-space instances,
21	  plus the scaffold `GrpObj Gm` and the resulting `Smooth Gm.hom`;
22	* the multiplicative identity `Gm.onePt = η[Gm kbar]`.
23	
24	Upstream strata: `BareScheme`, `ChartIso`. Downstream stratum: `GmScaling`.
25	-/
26	
27	set_option autoImplicit false
28	set_option linter.style.setOption false
29	
30	universe u
31	
32	open CategoryTheory Limits MonoidalCategory CartesianMonoidalCategory MonObj
33	
34	noncomputable section
35	
36	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
37	
38	/-! ### The standard `k̄`-points `0`, `1`, `∞` on `ℙ¹`
39	
40	The three distinguished `k̄`-points of `ℙ¹_{k̄}` are `[0 : 1]` (the affine origin), `[1 : 1]`
41	(the affine unit), and `[1 : 0]` (the point at infinity). They are encoded as morphisms
42	`𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ ProjectiveLineBar kbar`, i.e. sections of `ProjectiveLineBar.hom`.
43	
44	The construction goes through `Proj.fromOfGlobalSections`: a `k̄`-point of `Proj 𝒜` is
45	specified by an evaluation ring map `MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar →+* k̄` (composed into
46	`Γ(Spec k̄, ⊤)` via `Scheme.ΓSpecIso`) whose image of the irrelevant ideal `(X₀, X₁)`
47	generates the unit ideal — automatic whenever the evaluation vector has a unit coordinate. -/
48	
49	/-- **The underlying ring map of a `k̄`-point of `ℙ¹`.** Sends `X₀ ↦ v 0`, `X₁ ↦ v 1`,
50	then composes back into `Γ(Spec k̄, ⊤)` via the inverse of `Scheme.ΓSpecIso`. -/
51	private noncomputable def ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal
52	    (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (v : Fin 2 → kbar) :
53	    MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar →+* Γ(Spec (.of kbar), ⊤) :=
54	  (Scheme.ΓSpecIso (.of kbar)).inv.hom.comp (MvPolynomial.eval v)
55	
56	/-- **Irrelevant-ideal-maps-to-top condition** for `ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal`: if one
57	of the coordinates `v 0` or `v 1` is a unit, then the image of `(X₀, X₁)` generates the
58	unit ideal in `Γ(Spec k̄, ⊤)`. -/
59	private lemma ProjectiveLineBar.irrelevant_map_eq_top
60	    (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (v : Fin 2 → kbar) (i : Fin 2) (hi : IsUnit (v i)) :
61	    Ideal.map (ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v)
62	        (HomogeneousIdeal.irrelevant (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)).toIdeal = ⊤ := by
63	  have hX_mem : (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar) ∈
64	      (HomogeneousIdeal.irrelevant (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)).toIdeal :=
65	    HomogeneousIdeal.mem_irrelevant_of_mem _ Nat.zero_lt_one
66	      (MvPolynomial.isHomogeneous_X kbar i)
67	  have hImg_mem : ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v (MvPolynomial.X i) ∈
68	      Ideal.map (ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v)
69	        (HomogeneousIdeal.irrelevant (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)).toIdeal :=
70	    Ideal.mem_map_of_mem _ hX_mem
71	  have hImg_unit : IsUnit (ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v (MvPolynomial.X i)) := by
72	    unfold ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal
73	    rw [RingHom.comp_apply, MvPolynomial.eval_X]
74	    exact hi.map _
75	  rw [Ideal.eq_top_iff_one]
76	  obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := hImg_unit
77	  rw [show (1 : Γ(Spec (.of kbar), ⊤)) = ((u⁻¹ : Γ(Spec (.of kbar), ⊤)ˣ) : _) * u from
78	    (Units.inv_mul _).symm]
79	  exact Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ (hu.symm ▸ hImg_mem)
80	
81	/-- **Helper: construct a `k̄`-point of `ProjectiveLineBar kbar`** from an evaluation vector
82	`v : Fin 2 → kbar` with at least one unit coordinate. The underlying scheme map is
83	`Proj.fromOfGlobalSections` of the evaluation; the section condition chases through
84	`fromOfGlobalSections_toSpecZero` + `IsScalarTower kbar (𝒜 0) MvPoly` collapse to
85	`MvPolynomial.C` + `MvPolynomial.eval_C` + `toSpecΓ_SpecMap_ΓSpecIso_inv`. -/
86	private noncomputable def ProjectiveLineBar.pointOfVec
87	    (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (v : Fin 2 → kbar) (i : Fin 2) (hi : IsUnit (v i)) :
88	    𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ ProjectiveLineBar kbar :=
89	  Over.homMk
90	    (Proj.fromOfGlobalSections (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
91	      (ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v)
92	      (ProjectiveLineBar.irrelevant_map_eq_top kbar v i hi)) <| by
93	    -- Section condition: fromOfGlobalSections ≫ ProjectiveLineBar.hom = 𝟙.
94	    haveI : IsScalarTower kbar ↥(projectiveLineBarGrading kbar 0)
95	        (MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar) :=
96	      IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq fun _ => rfl
97	    -- Expose the structure morphism's composition shape.
98	    change Proj.fromOfGlobalSections _ _ _ ≫ Proj.toSpecZero _ ≫ Spec.map _ = _
99	    -- Combine via `fromOfGlobalSections_toSpecZero`, then unify the two Spec.maps.
100	    rw [← Category.assoc, Proj.fromOfGlobalSections_toSpecZero, Category.assoc,
101	      ← Spec.map_comp, ← CommRingCat.ofHom_comp, RingHom.comp_assoc,
102	      ← IsScalarTower.algebraMap_eq kbar, MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq]
103	    -- The inner composition `(evalIntoGlobal v) ∘ C` collapses to `(ΓSpecIso).inv.hom`.
104	    -- Build a CommRingCat-level equation, then apply `Spec.map` and finish.
105	    have hcc : CommRingCat.ofHom
106	        ((ProjectiveLineBar.evalIntoGlobal kbar v).comp MvPolynomial.C) =
107	        (Scheme.ΓSpecIso (CommRingCat.of kbar)).inv := by
108	      apply CommRingCat.hom_ext
109	      ext r
110	      change (Scheme.ΓSpecIso (CommRingCat.of kbar)).inv.hom
111	          ((MvPolynomial.eval v) (MvPolynomial.C r)) = _
112	      rw [MvPolynomial.eval_C]
113	    calc _ = (Spec (CommRingCat.of kbar)).toSpecΓ ≫
114	            Spec.map (Scheme.ΓSpecIso (CommRingCat.of kbar)).inv := by
115	            exact congrArg _ (congrArg Spec.map hcc)
116	      _ = _ := AlgebraicGeometry.toSpecΓ_SpecMap_ΓSpecIso_inv _
117	
118	/-- The `k̄`-point `0 = [0 : 1] ∈ ℙ¹`, encoded as a section of `ProjectiveLineBar.hom` via
119	`Proj.fromOfGlobalSections` of the evaluation `X₀ ↦ 0`, `X₁ ↦ 1`. -/
120	noncomputable def ProjectiveLineBar.zeroPt (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
121	    𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ ProjectiveLineBar kbar :=
122	  ProjectiveLineBar.pointOfVec kbar (fun i => if i = 0 then 0 else 1) 1 (by simp)
123	
124	/-- The `k̄`-point `1 = [1 : 1] ∈ ℙ¹`, encoded as a section via the evaluation
125	`X₀ ↦ 1`, `X₁ ↦ 1`. -/
126	noncomputable def ProjectiveLineBar.onePt (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
127	    𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ ProjectiveLineBar kbar :=
128	  ProjectiveLineBar.pointOfVec kbar (fun _ => 1) 0 (by simp)
129	
130	/-- The `k̄`-point `∞ = [1 : 0] ∈ ℙ¹`, encoded as a section via the evaluation
131	`X₀ ↦ 1`, `X₁ ↦ 0`. -/
132	noncomputable def ProjectiveLineBar.inftyPt (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
133	    𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ ProjectiveLineBar kbar :=
134	  ProjectiveLineBar.pointOfVec kbar (fun i => if i = 0 then 1 else 0) 0 (by simp)
135	
136	/-! ### (B) The additive group `𝔾_a` over `Spec k̄` -/
137	
138	/-- **The additive group `𝔾_a = 𝔸¹` over `Spec k̄` as an underlying scheme.** This is the
139	affine line `AffineSpace (Fin 1) (Spec (.of kbar))`. It is affine, locally of finite
140	presentation, and reduced (its global sections are `MvPolynomial (Fin 1) k̄`, a domain). -/
141	def GaScheme (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : Scheme :=
142	  AffineSpace.{0, u} (Fin 1) (Spec (.of kbar))
143	
144	/-- The natural `Over (Spec (.of kbar))` instance on `GaScheme` (via
145	`AlgebraicGeometry.AffineSpace.over`). -/
146	instance gaScheme_canOver (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
147	    (GaScheme kbar).Over (Spec (.of kbar)) :=
148	  inferInstanceAs ((AffineSpace.{0, u} (Fin 1) (Spec (.of kbar))).Over (Spec (.of kbar)))
149	
150	/-- **The additive group object `𝔾_a` over `Spec k̄` as an object of
151	`Over (Spec (.of kbar))`.** -/
152	abbrev Ga (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : Over (Spec (.of kbar)) :=
153	  (GaScheme kbar).asOver (Spec (.of kbar))
154	
155	/-- **`𝔾_a` is an affine morphism over `Spec k̄`.** FREE from
156	`AlgebraicGeometry.AffineSpace.instIsAffineHomOverSchemeInferInstanceOverClass`. -/
157	instance ga_isAffineHom (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
158	    IsAffineHom (Ga kbar).hom :=
159	  inferInstanceAs (IsAffineHom (AffineSpace.{0, u} (Fin 1) (Spec (.of kbar)) ↘
160	    (Spec (.of kbar))))
161	
162	/-- **`𝔾_a` is locally of finite presentation over `Spec k̄`.** FREE from
163	`AffineSpace.instLocallyOfFinitePresentation…OfFinite` (the index `Fin 1` is finite). -/
164	instance ga_locallyOfFinitePresentation (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
165	    LocallyOfFinitePresentation (Ga kbar).hom :=
166	  inferInstanceAs (LocallyOfFinitePresentation
167	    (AffineSpace.{0, u} (Fin 1) (Spec (.of kbar)) ↘ Spec (.of kbar)))
168	
169	/-- **`𝔾_a`'s underlying scheme is reduced.** Since the global sections are
170	`MvPolynomial (Fin 1) k̄`, a domain over a field, the affine scheme is reduced. The proof
171	transfers `IsReduced (Spec (.of (MvPolynomial _ _)))` (free for any reduced ring) across
172	`AffineSpace.isoOfIsAffine`. -/
173	instance ga_isReduced (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : IsReduced (Ga kbar).left :=
174	  isReduced_of_isOpenImmersion (AffineSpace.isoOfIsAffine (Fin 1) _).hom
175	
176	/-! ### (C) The multiplicative group `𝔾_m` over `Spec k̄` -/
177	
178	/-- **The ring `k̄[t, t⁻¹] = Localization.Away t`**, where `t = X () : MvPolynomial Unit k̄`.
179	This is the global-sections ring of `𝔾_m`. -/
180	abbrev GmRing (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : Type u :=
181	  Localization.Away (MvPolynomial.X () : MvPolynomial Unit kbar)
182	
183	/-- **The multiplicative group `𝔾_m = Spec k̄[t, t⁻¹]` as an underlying scheme.** This is
184	the chosen affine encoding (the analogist `gm-scaling-p1` D2.b verdict: AFFINE `Spec`, NOT
185	the basic-open of `𝔸¹` — the latter loses `IsAffine`). -/
186	def GmScheme (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : Scheme :=
187	  Spec (CommRingCat.of (GmRing kbar))
188	
189	/-- The natural `Over (Spec (.of kbar))` instance on `GmScheme`. -/
190	instance gmScheme_canOver (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
191	    (GmScheme kbar).Over (Spec (.of kbar)) where
192	  hom := Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap kbar (GmRing kbar)))
193	
194	/-- **The multiplicative group object `𝔾_m` over `Spec k̄` as an object of
195	`Over (Spec (.of kbar))`.** -/
196	abbrev Gm (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : Over (Spec (.of kbar)) :=
197	  (GmScheme kbar).asOver (Spec (.of kbar))
198	
199	/-- **`𝔾_m` is affine.** -/
200	instance gm_isAffine (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : IsAffine (Gm kbar).left :=
201	  inferInstanceAs (IsAffine (Spec (CommRingCat.of (GmRing kbar))))
202	
203	/-- **`𝔾_m` is locally of finite presentation over `Spec k̄`.** Follows from
204	`Algebra.FinitePresentation k̄ (k̄[t, t⁻¹])` (a localization of a polynomial ring at a single
205	element is finitely presented), bridged through
206	`AlgebraicGeometry.HasRingHomProperty.Spec_iff` for the `LocallyOfFinitePresentation` /
207	`RingHom.FinitePresentation` correspondence. -/
208	instance gm_locallyOfFinitePresentation (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
209	    LocallyOfFinitePresentation (Gm kbar).hom :=
210	  (HasRingHomProperty.Spec_iff (P := @LocallyOfFinitePresentation)).mpr
211	    ((RingHom.finitePresentation_algebraMap (B := GmRing kbar)).mpr
212	      inferInstance)
213	
214	/-- **`𝔾_m`'s underlying scheme is reduced.** `k̄[t, t⁻¹]` is a localization of a domain at
215	a non-zero-divisor, hence a domain, hence reduced. The `IsReduced (Spec _)` instance picks
216	up directly from `IsReduced (Localization.Away _)`. -/
217	instance gm_isReduced (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : IsReduced (Gm kbar).left :=
218	  inferInstanceAs (IsReduced (Spec (CommRingCat.of (GmRing kbar))))
219	
220	/-- **`k̄[t, t⁻¹]` is an integral domain.** Localization of the integral polynomial ring
221	`MvPolynomial Unit k̄` at the powers of a nonzero element `X () ≠ 0` preserves the domain
222	property (`IsLocalization.isDomain_localization` applied to
223	`Submonoid.powers (X ()) ≤ nonZeroDivisors`, the latter from `MvPolynomial.X_ne_zero`).
224	
225	Load-bearing for `gm_irreducibleSpace` and `gm_geomIrred`. -/
226	instance gmRing_isDomain (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : IsDomain (GmRing kbar) := by
227	  unfold GmRing
228	  exact IsLocalization.isDomain_localization
229	    (powers_le_nonZeroDivisors_of_noZeroDivisors (MvPolynomial.X_ne_zero _))
230	
231	/-- **`𝔾_m`'s underlying scheme is irreducible.** Follows from the fact that the
232	global-sections ring `GmRing = k̄[t, t⁻¹]` is an integral domain (`gmRing_isDomain`)
233	together with Mathlib's `Spec` of a domain being irreducible
234	(`PrimeSpectrum.irreducibleSpace`). -/
235	instance gm_irreducibleSpace (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
236	    IrreducibleSpace (Gm kbar).left := by
237	  change IrreducibleSpace (Spec (CommRingCat.of (GmRing kbar)))
238	  infer_instance
239	
240	/-- **`GrpObj`-structure on `𝔾_m` via `ofRepresentableBy`.**
241	
242	Installs the multiplicative-group structure on `Gm` using `GrpObj.ofRepresentableBy` with
243	the units functor `T ↦ GrpCat.of Γ(T.left, ⊤)ˣ`. The representable-by witness exploits the
244	fact that morphisms into `Spec (Localization.Away t)` correspond exactly to units in the
245	global sections (Mathlib's `IsLocalization.Away`-Spec bijection). Scaffold body — same
246	discipline as `ga_grpObj`.
247	
248	This `GrpObj Gm` is the LIVE consumer of the iter-166 `morphism_P1_to_grpScheme_const`
249	proof body (the `𝔾_m`-scaling shortcut applies `hom_additive_decomp_of_rigidity` with
250	`W = Gm`). -/
251	instance gm_grpObj (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] : GrpObj (Gm kbar) := sorry
252	
253	/-- **`𝔾_m` is smooth over `Spec k̄`.** FREE from `smooth_of_grpObj_of_isAlgClosed` once
254	`GrpObj`, `LocallyOfFinitePresentation`, and `IsReduced` are installed. -/
255	instance gm_smooth (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] [IsAlgClosed kbar] :
256	    Smooth (Gm kbar).hom :=
257	  have : GrpObj (Over.mk (Gm kbar).hom) := gm_grpObj kbar
258	  smooth_of_grpObj_of_isAlgClosed (Gm kbar).hom
259	
260	/-- The `k̄`-point `1 ∈ 𝔾_m` (the multiplicative identity), encoded as the group-object
261	unit `η[Gm kbar] : 𝟙_ ⟶ Gm kbar`. -/
262	def Gm.onePt (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] :
263	    𝟙_ (Over (Spec (.of kbar))) ⟶ Gm kbar :=
264	  η[Gm kbar]
265	
266	end AlgebraicGeometry

408	/-- The comparison morphism for the pullback of `f,g`.
409	This is an isomorphism iff `G` preserves the pullback of `f,g`; see
410	`Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Limits/Preserves/Shapes/Pullbacks.lean`
411	-/
412	def pullbackComparison (f : X ⟶ Z) (g : Y ⟶ Z) [HasPullback f g] [HasPullback (G.map f) (G.map g)] :
413	    G.obj (pullback f g) ⟶ pullback (G.map f) (G.map g) :=
414	  pullback.lift (G.map (pullback.fst f g)) (G.map (pullback.snd f g))
415	    (by simp only [← G.map_comp, pullback.condition])
416	
417	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
418	theorem pullbackComparison_comp_fst (f : X ⟶ Z) (g : Y ⟶ Z) [HasPullback f g]
419	    [HasPullback (G.map f) (G.map g)] :
420	    pullbackComparison G f g ≫ pullback.fst _ _ = G.map (pullback.fst f g) :=
421	  pullback.lift_fst _ _ _
422	
423	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
424	theorem pullbackComparison_comp_snd (f : X ⟶ Z) (g : Y ⟶ Z) [HasPullback f g]
425	    [HasPullback (G.map f) (G.map g)] :
426	    pullbackComparison G f g ≫ pullback.snd _ _ = G.map (pullback.snd f g) :=
427	  pullback.lift_snd _ _ _
428

432	    [HasPullback (G.map f) (G.map g)] {W : C} {h : W ⟶ X} {k : W ⟶ Y} (w : h ≫ f = k ≫ g) :
433	    G.map (pullback.lift _ _ w) ≫ pullbackComparison G f g =

695	
696	variable (R S T : Type u) [CommRing R] [CommRing S] [CommRing T] [Algebra R S] [Algebra R T]
697	
698	open TensorProduct Algebra.TensorProduct CommRingCat RingHomClass
699	
700	/-- The isomorphism between the fibred product of two schemes `Spec S` and `Spec T`
701	over a scheme `Spec R` and the `Spec` of the tensor product `S ⊗[R] T`. -/
702	noncomputable
703	def pullbackSpecIso :
704	    pullback (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap R S)))
705	      (Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap R T))) ≅ Spec (.of <| S ⊗[R] T) :=
706	  letI H := IsLimit.equivIsoLimit (PullbackCone.eta _)
707	    (PushoutCocone.isColimitEquivIsLimitOp _ (CommRingCat.pushoutCoconeIsColimit R S T))
708	  limit.isoLimitCone ⟨_, isLimitPullbackConeMapOfIsLimit Scheme.Spec _ H⟩
709	
710	/--
711	The composition of the inverse of the isomorphism `pullbackSpecIso R S T` (from the pullback of
712	`Spec S ⟶ Spec R` and `Spec T ⟶ Spec R` to `Spec (S ⊗[R] T)`) with the first projection is
713	the morphism `Spec (S ⊗[R] T) ⟶ Spec S` obtained by applying `Spec.map` to the ring morphism
714	`s ↦ s ⊗ₜ[R] 1`.
715	-/
716	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
717	lemma pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst :
718	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).inv ≫ pullback.fst _ _ = Spec.map (ofHom includeLeftRingHom) :=
719	  limit.isoLimitCone_inv_π _ _
720	
721	@[reassoc]
722	lemma pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst' :
723	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).inv ≫ pullback.fst _ _ = Spec.map (ofHom (algebraMap S _)) :=
724	  pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst ..
725	
726	/--
727	The composition of the inverse of the isomorphism `pullbackSpecIso R S T` (from the pullback of
728	`Spec S ⟶ Spec R` and `Spec T ⟶ Spec R` to `Spec (S ⊗[R] T)`) with the second projection is
729	the morphism `Spec (S ⊗[R] T) ⟶ Spec T` obtained by applying `Spec.map` to the ring morphism
730	`t ↦ 1 ⊗ₜ[R] t`.
731	-/
732	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
733	lemma pullbackSpecIso_inv_snd :
734	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).inv ≫ pullback.snd _ _ =
735	      Spec.map (ofHom (R := T) (S := S ⊗[R] T) (toRingHom includeRight)) :=
736	  limit.isoLimitCone_inv_π _ _
737	
738	/--
739	The composition of the isomorphism `pullbackSpecIso R S T` (from the pullback of
740	`Spec S ⟶ Spec R` and `Spec T ⟶ Spec R` to `Spec (S ⊗[R] T)`) with the morphism
741	`Spec (S ⊗[R] T) ⟶ Spec S` obtained by applying `Spec.map` to the ring morphism `s ↦ s ⊗ₜ[R] 1`
742	is the first projection.
743	-/
744	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
745	lemma pullbackSpecIso_hom_fst :
746	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).hom ≫ Spec.map (ofHom includeLeftRingHom) = pullback.fst _ _ := by
747	  rw [← pullbackSpecIso_inv_fst, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
748	
749	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
750	lemma pullbackSpecIso_hom_fst' :
751	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).hom ≫ Spec.map (ofHom (algebraMap S _)) = pullback.fst _ _ :=
752	  pullbackSpecIso_hom_fst ..
753	
754	/--
755	The composition of the isomorphism `pullbackSpecIso R S T` (from the pullback of
756	`Spec S ⟶ Spec R` and `Spec T ⟶ Spec R` to `Spec (S ⊗[R] T)`) with the morphism
757	`Spec (S ⊗[R] T) ⟶ Spec T` obtained by applying `Spec.map` to the ring morphism `t ↦ 1 ⊗ₜ[R] t`
758	is the second projection.
759	-/
760	@[reassoc (attr := simp)]
761	lemma pullbackSpecIso_hom_snd :
762	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).hom ≫ Spec.map (ofHom (toRingHom includeRight)) = pullback.snd _ _ := by
763	  rw [← pullbackSpecIso_inv_snd, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]

767	    (pullbackSpecIso R S T).hom ≫ Spec.map (ofHom (algebraMap R _)) =

772	    (inl : B ⟶ P) (inr : C ⟶ P) (h : IsPushout f g inl inr) :
773	    IsPullback (Spec.map inl) (Spec.map inr) (Spec.map f) (Spec.map g) :=
774	  IsPullback.map Scheme.Spec h.op.flip
775	
776	lemma isPullback_SpecMap_pushout {A B C : CommRingCat} (f : A ⟶ B) (g : A ⟶ C) :
777	    IsPullback (Spec.map (pushout.inl f g))
778	      (Spec.map (pushout.inr f g)) (Spec.map f) (Spec.map g) := by
779	  apply isPullback_SpecMap_of_isPushout
780	  exact IsPushout.of_hasPushout f g

324:def affineOpenCoverOfIrrelevantLESpan {ι : Type*} (f : ι → A) {m : ι → ℕ}
340:  affineOpenCoverOfIrrelevantLESpan 𝒜

320	open TopologicalSpace.Opens in
321	/-- Given a family of homogeneous elements `f` of positive degree that spans the irrelevant ideal,
322	`Spec (A_f)₀ ⟶ Proj A` forms an affine open cover of `Proj A`. -/
323	noncomputable
324	def affineOpenCoverOfIrrelevantLESpan {ι : Type*} (f : ι → A) {m : ι → ℕ}
325	    (f_deg : ∀ i, f i ∈ 𝒜 (m i)) (hm : ∀ i, 0 < m i)
326	    (hf : (HomogeneousIdeal.irrelevant 𝒜).toIdeal ≤ Ideal.span (Set.range f)) :
327	    (Proj 𝒜).AffineOpenCover where
328	  I₀ := ι
329	  X i := .of (Away 𝒜 (f i))
330	  f i := awayι 𝒜 (f i) (f_deg i) (hm i)
331	  idx x := (mem_iSup.mp ((iSup_basicOpen_eq_top 𝒜 f hf).ge (Set.mem_univ x))).choose
332	  covers x := by
333	    change x ∈ (awayι 𝒜 _ _ _).opensRange
334	    rw [opensRange_awayι]
335	    exact (mem_iSup.mp ((iSup_basicOpen_eq_top 𝒜 f hf).ge (Set.mem_univ x))).choose_spec
336	
337	/-- `Proj A` is covered by `Spec (A_f)₀` for all homogeneous elements of positive degree. -/
338	@[simps! f] noncomputable
339	def affineOpenCover : (Proj 𝒜).AffineOpenCover :=
340	  affineOpenCoverOfIrrelevantLESpan 𝒜
341	    (ι := Σ i : PNat, 𝒜 i) (m := fun i ↦ i.1) (fun i ↦ i.2) (fun i ↦ i.2.2) (fun i ↦ i.1.2) <| by
342	  classical
343	  intro z hz
344	  rw [← DirectSum.sum_support_decompose 𝒜 z]
345	  refine Ideal.sum_mem _ fun c hc ↦ if hc0 : c = 0 then ?_ else
346	    Ideal.subset_span ⟨⟨⟨c, Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hc0⟩, _⟩, rfl⟩
347	  convert Ideal.zero_mem _
348	  subst hc0
349	  exact hz
350	
351	end basicOpen
352	
353	section stalk
354	
355	/-- The stalk of `Proj A` at `x` is the degree `0` part of the localization of `A` at `x`. -/
356	noncomputable
357	def stalkIso (x : Proj 𝒜) :
358	    (Proj 𝒜).presheaf.stalk x ≅ .of (AtPrime 𝒜 x.asHomogeneousIdeal.toIdeal) :=
359	  (stalkIso' 𝒜 x).toCommRingCatIso

Second, it tries to abstract these occurrences of 'a' to create a function 'm := fun _a => ...', called the *motive*, with the property that 'm a' is definitionally equal to 'e'. Third, we observe that 'congrArg' implies that 'm a = m b', which can be used with lemmas such as 'Eq.mpr' to change the goal. However, if 'e' depends on specific properties of 'a', then the motive 'm' might not typecheck.

Possible solutions: use rewrite's 'occs' configuration option to limit which occurrences are rewritten, or use 'simp' or 'conv' mode, which have strategies for certain kinds of dependencies (these tactics can handle proofs and 'Decidable' instances whose types depend on the rewritten term, and 'simp' can apply user-defined '@[congr]' theorems as well).

/-- **Shared per-chart helper for `gmScalingP1`** (iter-174 Sub-task A per
`analogies/chart-bridge-shared-helper.md` Decision 3). On the `i`-th chart of the
`gmScalingP1_cover`, the composition `gmScalingP1_chart kbar i ≫ PLB.hom` agrees with
`(gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom`.

This is the per-chart certificate used by `gmScalingP1_over_coherence` (via
`Scheme.Cover.hom_ext` + `Scheme.Cover.ι_glueMorphisms_assoc`).

**Status (iter-177 Lane GM-AXIOM):** body discharged via the first conjunct of the
temporary axiom `gmScalingP1_chart_data_temp` (HARD STOP corrective; see the axiom's
docstring). -/
private lemma gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (i : Fin 2) :
    gmScalingP1_chart kbar i ≫ (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom =
      (gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom := by
  -- ATTEMPT: Step 3 (1) of analogies/gmscaling-cover-bridge.md.
  -- Strategy: (a) unfold gmScalingP1_chart; (b) use `change` to retype the outer `≫`'s
  -- middle object so `awayι_comp_PLB_hom` fires (`Proj 𝒜` vs `ProjectiveLineBarScheme kbar`
  -- defeq blocker; NEW finding iter-179); (c) chase `awayι_comp_PLB_hom`
  -- + `homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap` + `MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_comp_C` to
  -- collapse the chart-side ring map to `algebraMap kbar (Away_i ⊗ GmRing)`.
  --
  -- STATUS (iter-179): Steps (a)-(c) land cleanly. The residual after (c) is
  --   `(gmScalingP1_cover_X_iso kbar i).hom ≫ Spec.map (algMap kbar (Away_i ⊗ GmRing))
  --      = (gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom`
  -- where the chart-iso target carries `(![X 0, X 1]) i` (NOT `MvPolynomial.X i`).
  --
  -- The next step (`pullbackSpecIso_hom_base`/`_fst`) silently refuses to unify even
  -- with explicit `R, S, T`, even with `fin_cases i` to canonical `Fin 2` indices,
  -- and even with `Algebra.TensorProduct.algebraMap_def` unfolding. The blocker
  -- appears to be a downstream variant of the same `Spec`-middle-type elaboration
  -- discrepancy that bit `awayι_comp_PLB_hom` (which we solved via `change`), but
  -- the chained outer `≫`'s middle types make a clean `change` impractical here.
  -- PARTIAL — iter-181 escalation will dispatch.
  unfold gmScalingP1_chart
  have h := awayι_comp_PLB_hom kbar (m := 1) Nat.one_pos
    (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar)
    (MvPolynomial.isHomogeneous_X kbar i)
  change (gmScalingP1_cover_X_iso kbar i).hom ≫ _ ≫
      ((Proj.awayι (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
          (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar)
          (MvPolynomial.isHomogeneous_X kbar i) Nat.one_pos :
        Spec (CommRingCat.of (HomogeneousLocalization.Away
          (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar) (MvPolynomial.X i))) ⟶
          Proj (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)) ≫
        (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom) = _
  rw [h, ← Spec.map_comp, ← CommRingCat.ofHom_comp, RingHom.comp_assoc,
    homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap, MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq,
    MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_comp_C]

input.new_string:
/-- **Shared per-chart helper for `gmScalingP1`** (iter-174 Sub-task A per
`analogies/chart-bridge-shared-helper.md` Decision 3). On the `i`-th chart of the
`gmScalingP1_cover`, the composition `gmScalingP1_chart kbar i ≫ PLB.hom` agrees with
`(gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom`.

This is the per-chart certificate used by `gmScalingP1_over_coherence` (via
`Scheme.Cover.hom_ext` + `Scheme.Cover.ι_glueMorphisms_assoc`).

**Status (iter-180):** body retired axiom-clean via the empirically-verified
`set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` recipe of
`analogies/pullbackspeciso-bypass.md` (Decision 4). The option collapses the
`Algebra.compHom`-driven heartbeat sink on the `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` rewrite
that blocked iter-175 through iter-179. -/
set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
private lemma gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq (kbar : Type u) [Field kbar] (i : Fin 2) :
    gmScalingP1_chart kbar i ≫ (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom =
      (gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom := by
  -- Stage 1 (iter-179): unfold the chart map, apply `awayι_comp_PLB_hom` after a
  -- type-realigning `change`, and collapse the right-hand `Spec.map` chain into
  -- `Spec.map (algMap kbar (Away_i ⊗ GmRing))` via
  -- `homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap` + `MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_comp_C`.
  unfold gmScalingP1_chart
  have h := awayι_comp_PLB_hom kbar (m := 1) Nat.one_pos
    (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar)
    (MvPolynomial.isHomogeneous_X kbar i)
  change (gmScalingP1_cover_X_iso kbar i).hom ≫ _ ≫
      ((Proj.awayι (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
          (MvPolynomial.X i : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar)
          (MvPolynomial.isHomogeneous_X kbar i) Nat.one_pos :
        Spec (CommRingCat.of (HomogeneousLocalization.Away
          (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar) (MvPolynomial.X i))) ⟶
          Proj (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)) ≫
        (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom) = _
  rw [h, ← Spec.map_comp, ← CommRingCat.ofHom_comp, RingHom.comp_assoc,
    homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap, MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq,
    MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_comp_C]
  -- Stage 2 (iter-180 fix): the `respectTransparency` option lets the
  -- `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` simp lemma fire on the buried iso chain;
  -- it produces `pullback.fst _ _ ≫ Spec.map (algMap kbar Away_i)` in place
  -- of `(pullbackSpecIso).hom ≫ Spec.map (algMap kbar (Away_i ⊗ GmRing))`.
  -- The follow-up simps collapse the `pullback.congrHom`-wrapped map into a
  -- bare `pullback.fst (cover.f i ≫ PLB.hom) Gm.hom`.
  unfold gmScalingP1_cover_X_iso
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Category.assoc, pullbackSpecIso_hom_base,
    pullback.congrHom_hom, pullback.lift_fst_assoc, Category.id_comp]
  -- Stage 3: re-align `Proj.awayι (![X 0, X 1] i) ⋯ ⋯` with `(cover.openCover.f i)`
  -- so `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_hom_fst_assoc` can match its `f' ≫ f` pattern.
  change (pullbackSymmetry (pullback.fst (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom (Gm kbar).hom)
        ((projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i)).hom ≫
      (pullbackRightPullbackFstIso (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom (Gm kbar).hom
          ((projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i)).hom ≫
        pullback.fst
            ((projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i ≫
              (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom)
            (Gm kbar).hom ≫
          Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom (algebraMap kbar
            (HomogeneousLocalization.Away (projectiveLineBarGrading kbar)
              ((![(MvPolynomial.X 0 : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar), MvPolynomial.X 1] :
                Fin 2 → MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar) i)))) =
        (gmScalingP1_cover kbar).f i ≫ ((ProjectiveLineBar kbar) ⊗ Gm kbar).hom
  simp only [pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_hom_fst_assoc,
    pullbackSymmetry_hom_comp_fst_assoc]
  -- Stage 4: reverse the chart bridge back to `cover.f i ≫ PLB.hom` so the residual
  -- matches `(PLB ⊗ Gm).hom`'s definitional form.
  rw [← awayι_comp_PLB_hom kbar (projectiveLineBarAffineCover_hm i)
    ((![(MvPolynomial.X 0 : MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar), MvPolynomial.X 1] :
      Fin 2 → MvPolynomial (Fin 2) kbar) i)
    (projectiveLineBarAffineCover_fDeg kbar i)]
  -- Stage 5: expose `(PLB ⊗ Gm).hom = pullback.fst PLB.hom Gm.hom ≫ PLB.hom`
  -- and `(gmScalingP1_cover).f i = pullback.fst (pullback.fst PLB.hom Gm.hom)
  -- ((cover).openCover.f i)`, then close via `pullback.condition_assoc`.
  change pullback.snd (pullback.fst (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom (Gm kbar).hom)
        ((projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i) ≫
      (projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i ≫
        (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom =
    pullback.fst (pullback.fst (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom (Gm kbar).hom)
        ((projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i) ≫
      pullback.fst (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom (Gm kbar).hom ≫
        (ProjectiveLineBar kbar).hom
  rw [← pullback.condition_assoc]

# AlgebraicJacobian/Genus0BaseObjects/GmScaling.lean — Lane A iter-180

**Result:** PARTIAL retirement — PRIMARY TARGET (`gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq`) closed
axiom-clean via the empirically-verified `respectTransparency` recipe; both TEMP
axioms DELETED; 2 substantive sorries (one per remaining body) survive without
laundering.

## Lane A end-state vs. plan

| Target | Pre-iter-180 | Post-iter-180 |
|---|---|---|
| `gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq` | sorry (iter-179 partial body) | **CLOSED axiom-clean** |
| `gmScalingP1_chart_agreement` | `(gmScalingP1_chart_data_temp).2` | diagonal closed; cross sorry (1 sub-case) |
| `gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero` | `gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero_temp` | direct sorry (no axiom) |
| `axiom gmScalingP1_chart_data_temp` | declared (L193-200) | **DELETED** |
| `axiom gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero_temp` | declared (L370-373) | **DELETED** |

Final file: 4 sorries (down from 3 + 2 axioms pre-iter-180), 0 axioms.

* L270 — `gmScalingP1_chart_agreement` cross case `(0,1)/(1,0)` (newly named).
* L353 — `gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero` (was axiom-laundered, now honest sorry).
* L435 — `gm_geomIrred` (pre-existing scaffold, off-target).
* L465 — `projGm_isReduced` (pre-existing scaffold, off-target).

`lake build AlgebraicJacobian` returns GREEN. Full module compiles in 10s; no
new errors introduced; no downstream regressions.

`#print axioms` verification:
* `AlgebraicGeometry.gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq` → `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (kernel-only).
* `AlgebraicGeometry.gmScalingP1_chart_agreement` → `{propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (cross case sorry).
* `AlgebraicGeometry.gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero` → `{propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (direct sorry).

## `gmScalingP1_chart_PLB_eq` (line 213, axiom-clean)

### Attempt 1
- **Approach:** Apply the iter-180 plan-phase analogist consult's
  empirically-verified recipe verbatim: `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency
  false in` wraps the lemma; the `simp only [..., pullbackSpecIso_hom_base, ...]`
  fires the load-bearing rewrite that 5 prior iters could not.
- **Result:** RESOLVED axiom-clean.
- **Key insight:** the `respectTransparency` option lets the elaborator see through
  the `Algebra.compHom`-driven instance unification that was the heartbeat sink.
  Per the consult's verification block, `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` fires WITH the
  option and is reported "unused" WITHOUT — confirmed live on the actual stuck goal
  at L250 via `lean_multi_attempt`.
- **Stages (per the recipe + minor adjustments):**
  1. `unfold gmScalingP1_chart` + `change` to expose `(Proj.awayι (X i) ⋯ ⋯ ≫ PLB.hom)`,
     then `rw [awayι_comp_PLB_hom, ← Spec.map_comp, ← CommRingCat.ofHom_comp,
     RingHom.comp_assoc, homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap,
     MvPolynomial.algebraMap_eq, MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_comp_C]` collapses the
     chart-side ring chain to `Spec.map (algMap kbar (Away_i ⊗ GmRing))` (iter-179
     work; carried forward).
  2. `unfold gmScalingP1_cover_X_iso` + `simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Category.assoc,
     pullbackSpecIso_hom_base, pullback.congrHom_hom, pullback.lift_fst_assoc,
     Category.id_comp]` fires `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` (the load-bearing
     iter-180 step) and collapses the `pullback.congrHom` layer to a bare
     `pullback.fst`.
  3. `change` re-aligns `Proj.awayι (![X 0, X 1] i) ⋯ ⋯` with
     `(projectiveLineBarAffineCover kbar).openCover.f i` so the next simp's
     pattern matches syntactically (the `respectTransparency` option helps the
     defeq engine on instances, but `simp` still wants its pattern's `f' ≫ f`
     to literally agree with the goal's `f' ≫ f`).
  4. `simp only [pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_hom_fst_assoc,
     pullbackSymmetry_hom_comp_fst_assoc]` collapses the two outer iso layers to
     `pullback.snd (pullback.fst PLB.hom Gm.hom) ((cover).openCover.f i)`.
  5. `rw [← awayι_comp_PLB_hom kbar (projectiveLineBarAffineCover_hm i) ...
     (projectiveLineBarAffineCover_fDeg kbar i)]` reverses the chart bridge so
     the residual matches `(PLB ⊗ Gm).hom`'s definitional form.
  6. Final `change` exposes `(PLB ⊗ Gm).hom = pullback.fst PLB.hom Gm.hom ≫ PLB.hom`
     and `(gmScalingP1_cover).f i = pullback.fst (pullback.fst PLB.hom Gm.hom)
     ((cover).openCover.f i)`; then `rw [← pullback.condition_assoc]` closes via
     `pullback.fst f g ≫ f ≫ X = pullback.snd f g ≫ g ≫ X`.
- **Helper budget used:** 0 (only `change` fallbacks per the recipe's reversal trigger).
- **Lemmas leveraged:** `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` (the load-bearing one);
  `pullback.congrHom_hom`, `pullback.lift_fst_assoc`, `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_hom_fst_assoc`,
  `pullbackSymmetry_hom_comp_fst_assoc`, `pullback.condition_assoc` (all canonical Mathlib);
  `awayι_comp_PLB_hom` (existing project helper, iter-173, axiom-clean);
  `homogeneousLocalizationAwayIso_algebraMap` (existing project helper, iter-174,
  axiom-clean); `projectiveLineBarAffineCover_hm`, `projectiveLineBarAffineCover_fDeg`
  (iter-175 hoists, axiom-clean).
- **Why the `change` workaround?**
  After `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base + pullback.congrHom_hom + pullback.lift_fst_assoc +
  Category.id_comp` fire, the goal carries `pullback.fst (Proj.awayι (![X 0, X 1] i)
  ⋯ ⋯ ≫ PLB.hom) Gm.hom`. The `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso _ _ _` iso, however, is
  parametrised by `((cover).openCover.f i)`. The simp lemma
  `pullbackRightPullbackFstIso_hom_fst_assoc` requires literal pattern agreement
  on `f'`, but `(cover).openCover.f i = Proj.awayι (![X 0, X 1] i) ⋯ ⋯` only by
  *definitional* equality (the cover's `.f` field unfolds through `whnf`). The
  `change` makes them syntactically identical.

### Empirical verification chain (iter-180)
The recipe was verified end-to-end via `lean_multi_attempt` at the original
sorry position before any file edits:
* Stage 1 alone (without option): `simp` returns "unused" warning on
  `pullbackSpecIso_hom_base` (the bug).
* Stage 1 alone (with option): `simp` fires, producing the post-rewrite goal
  with `pullback.fst (Spec.map (algMap kbar Away_i)) (Spec.map (algMap kbar GmRing))
  ≫ Spec.map (algMap kbar Away_i)`.
* All 6 stages composed: `goals: []` (verified by tool).

  Shapes/Pullback/Mono.lean:199` — this gives `pullback.fst f f = pullback.snd f f`

## `gmScalingP1_collapse_at_zero` (line 353, PARTIAL — axiom-laundering retired)

### Attempt 1
- **Approach (intended):** unfold `gmScalingP1` into its `Over.homMk + glueMorphisms`
